title: DataTag
content:
# DataTag

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### create_data_tag(data: Optional[Union[requests.DataTagCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.DataTagCreate

Create a new Data Tag event.


### list_data_tag(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], data: Optional[Union[requests.DataTagList, Mapping[str, object]]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.DataTag], responses.DataTagListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Data Tags. The Data Tags can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### create_tag(data: Optional[Union[requests.TagCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.TagCreate

Create a new Tag.


### list_tag(search: Optional[Sequence[str]], names: Optional[Sequence[str]], pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.Tag], responses.TagListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Tags. The Tags can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### delete_tag(tag_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete an existing Tag. An error will be returned if there are any current links to a DataTag and the Tag will not be deleted. **Permission Required:** `kelvin.permission.datatag.delete`.


### get_tag(tag_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.TagGet

Retrieves a Tag.


### update_tag(tag_name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.TagUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.TagUpdate

Update an existing Tag. The Tag key `name` can not be updated.


### delete_data_tag(datatag_id: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete an existing Data Tag. **Permission Required:** `kelvin.permission.datatag.delete`.


### get_data_tag(datatag_id: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.DataTagGet

Retrieves a Data Tag.


### update_data_tag(datatag_id: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.DataTagUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.DataTagUpdate

Update an existing Data Tag. Any parameters that are not provided will remain unchanged.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.data_tag.create_data_tag()
